vocab.prompt: In Cursor Chat (Cmd+L), reference files with @filename to add them to context. Use @codebase for project-wide context. Cmd+K for inline edits — describe the change, not the implementation.
vocab.context: Use .cursorrules file at project root for persistent instructions: coding style, framework conventions, what to avoid. Cursor reads this automatically on every request.
vocab.composer: Cursor Composer (Cmd+Shift+I) handles multi-file changes. Describe the feature end-to-end and let Composer plan the changes. Review the diff before applying — Composer shows all affected files.
vocab.workflow: For debugging: open the file with the error, highlight the broken code, press Cmd+K and describe what it should do instead. Paste error messages directly into Chat for root-cause analysis.
vocab.review: Use Cursor's diff view to review all AI-generated changes before accepting. Reject individual file changes if incorrect. Ask Cursor to explain any change you do not understand before accepting.
